history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young Indonesian man with curly black hair and light brown skin, looking directly at the camera with a neutral expression. He is wearing a dark green, long-sleeved quarter-zip sweater. The background consists of vertical, shimmering gold curtains that create a sense of depth and texture. The lighting is soft and diffused, casting subtle shadows on his face and body, with a slightly warm tone. The overall mood is casual and relaxed, with a hint of sophistication due to the lighting and backdrop. The image has a slightly grainy, film-like quality.
